mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-03#Sql001 */ M_F_CODE,M_F_TOKUSYU,M_F_SHIMEKIRI FROM FUND WHERE M_F_TYPE IN ('1','2') AND M_F_DELFLG = '0' AND M_F_ET_START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND M_F_NRICODE = #{req.fundCodeTimes}||#{req.fundCodeIssues}||' '

select /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-03#Sql002 */ A.FDC_CTL_DATE , ( select '1' from ( select min(to_char(c.operating_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) as dd from OPERATING_MASTER c where c.operating_date >= TRUNC(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE) ) b where A.FDC_CTL_DATE = b.dd ) as BUSINESS_DAY_FLAG from BF_FUND_CONTROL_DATE A where A.FDC_F_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd} AND A.FDC_CLASS = 'H' AND A.FDC_CTL_DATE >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMM') || '01' and A.FDC_CTL_DATE <= to_char( last_day(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE) , 'YYYYMMDD' )

select /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-03#Sql003 */ A.FDC_CTL_DATE , ( select '1' from ( select min(to_char(c.operating_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) as dd from OPERATING_MASTER c where c.operating_date >= TRUNC(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE) ) b where A.FDC_CTL_DATE = b.dd ) as BUSINESS_DAY_FLAG from BF_FUND_CONTROL_DATE A where A.FDC_F_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd} AND A.FDC_CLASS = 'H' AND A.FDC_CTL_DATE >= TO_CHAR( ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 1) , 'YYYYMM' ) || '01' and A.FDC_CTL_DATE <= TO_CHAR( LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 1)) , 'YYYYMMDD' )

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-03#Sql004 */ TO_CHAR(MIN(OPERATING_DATE), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS deadlineDate FROM OPERATING_MASTER WHERE OPERATING_DATE >= TRUNC(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE) AND OPERATING_DATE <= TRUNC(last_day(add_months(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 1))) AND OPERATING_DATE NOT IN ( SELECT TO_DATE(FDC_CTL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') FROM BF_FUND_CONTROL_DATE WHERE FDC_F_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd} AND FDC_CLASS = 'H' )

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-03#Sql005 */ TO_CHAR(MIN(OPERATING_DATE), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS deadlineDate FROM OPERATING_MASTER WHERE OPERATING_DATE >= TRUNC(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE) AND OPERATING_DATE <= TRUNC(last_day(add_months(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 1))) AND OPERATING_DATE NOT IN ( SELECT TO_DATE(FDC_CTL_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') FROM BF_FUND_CONTROL_DATE WHERE FDC_F_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd} AND FDC_CLASS = 'H' ) AND OPERATING_DATE != TO_DATE(#{req.deadlineDateRecent},'YYYY/MM/DD')

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-#Sql006 */ SUBSTRB(FBM_START_TIME,3,8) AS FBM_START_TIME , FBM_BODY FROM FUND_BULLETIN_MASTER where FBM_START_TIME <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AND FBM_END_TIME > IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AND FBM_DELETE_FLG = '0' AND FBM_TYPE = #{req.fbmType} AND FBM_STATE = '1' AND FBM_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-#Sql009 */ A.F_D_CODE , A.F_D_GROUP , A.F_D_POLICY , REPLACE ( A.F_D_TRUST_CHARGE , UTL_RAW.CAST_TO_NVARCHAR2(HEXTORAW('FF5E')) , UTL_RAW.CAST_TO_NVARCHAR2(HEXTORAW('301C')) ) as F_D_TRUST_CHARGE , A.F_D_RESERVED_ASSET , A.F_D_ENTRY_TEXT , A.F_D_KAIYAKU_TEXT , A.F_D_ACCOUNTING_DATE , NVL(TO_CHAR(A.F_D_SETTING_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'),'-') AS F_D_SETTING_DATE , A.F_D_DIVIDENDS_SCHEDULE , A.F_D_INSTRUCTIONS , A.F_D_TRUST_MONEY_AVERAGE , A.F_D_HOLIDAY , A.F_D_TRUST_CHARGE_RATIO_SALES , A.F_D_TRUST_CHARGE_RATIO_TRUST , A.F_D_TRUST_CHARGE_RATIO_TRUSTEE , A.F_D_DAYS_WEB , A.F_D_REMARKS , A.F_D_SELL_WAY , case A.F_D_SYOKAN_KBN when '1' then '' when '2' then '（繰上償還予定）' when '3' then '（繰上償還）' end as F_D_SYOKAN_KBN from fund_information A inner join fund B ON A.F_D_CODE = B.M_F_CODE WHERE ( A.F_D_CREATE_HTML_FLG = '1' OR B.M_F_ET_START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') ) AND B.M_F_TYPE in ('1', '2') AND B.M_F_DELFLG = '0' AND A.F_D_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-#Sql010 */ M_F_TYPE , M_F_NAME , M_F_ITAKU_CMP , M_F_GAKUMEN , M_F_END_DATE , case lengthb(M_F_SYOKAN_DATE) when 8 then substrb(M_F_SYOKAN_DATE, 1, 4) || '/' || substrb(M_F_SYOKAN_DATE, 5, 2) || '/' || substrb(M_F_SYOKAN_DATE, 7, 2) else '無期限' end as M_F_SYOKAN_DATE , substrb(M_F_SHIMEKIRI,1,2) || ':' || substrb(M_F_SHIMEKIRI,3,2) as M_F_SHIMEKIRI , M_F_H_KUBUN , M_F_H_TANIKUCHI , M_F_H_MINKUCHI , M_F_H_KUCHISU , M_F_H_MINTANI2 , M_F_H_BSTANI2 , M_F_H_UPPER1 , M_F_H_GAKU1 , M_F_H_RITSU1 , M_F_H_UPPER2 , M_F_H_GAKU2 , M_F_H_RITSU2 , M_F_H_UPPER3 , M_F_H_GAKU3 , M_F_H_RITSU3 , M_F_H_UPPER4 , M_F_H_GAKU4 , M_F_H_RITSU4 , M_F_H_UPPER5 , M_F_H_GAKU5 , M_F_H_RITSU5 , M_F_H_UPPER6 , M_F_H_GAKU6 , M_F_H_RITSU6 , M_F_H_UPPER7 , M_F_H_GAKU7 , M_F_H_RITSU7 , M_F_K_MINKUCHI , M_F_K_KUCHISU , M_F_K_MINTANI2 , M_F_K_BSTANI2 , case trim(M_F_YKUJYOKUBUN) when '0' then 'ご注文日の当日' when '1' then 'ご注文日の翌営業日' else 'ご注文日の' || trim(M_F_YKUJYOKUBUN) || '営業日後' end as M_F_YKUJYOKUBUN , '約定日から'||trim(M_F_UKEWATASHI)||'営業日後' as M_F_UKEWATASHI , YUGU_RITU_BUNSI , M_F_TUMITATE_KUBUN , M_F_TEIKI_SELL_KUBUN , case when M_F_TYPE = '1' then '口数：証券口座でのお受取' when M_F_TYPE = '2' and M_F_SAITOUSHI_KUBUN = '1' then '金額：再投資' when M_F_TYPE = '2' and M_F_SAITOUSHI_KUBUN = '2' then '金額：証券口座でのお受取または再投資' end as M_F_SAITOUSHI_KUBUN , M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU1 , M_F_H_GAKU_SEICHOU1 , M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU1 , M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU2 , M_F_H_GAKU_SEICHOU2 , M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU2 , M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU3 , M_F_H_GAKU_SEICHOU3 , M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU3 , M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU4 , M_F_H_GAKU_SEICHOU4 , M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU4 , M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU5 , M_F_H_GAKU_SEICHOU5 , M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU5 , M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU6 , M_F_H_GAKU_SEICHOU6 , M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU6 , M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU7 , M_F_H_GAKU_SEICHOU7 , M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU7 , YUGU_RITU_BUNBO_SEICHOU , YUGU_RITU_BUNSI_SEICHOU , M_F_SOUGO_SEICHOU_SERVICE_KBN , M_F_SEICHOU_TESURYO_SETTING FROM FUND WHERE M_F_TYPE IN ('1', '2') AND M_F_DELFLG = '0' AND M_F_ET_START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND M_F_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-#Sql011 */ FCM_TYPE , FCM_CODE , FCM_UPPER1 , FCM_RITSU1 , FCM_UPPER2 , FCM_RITSU2 , FCM_UPPER3 , FCM_RITSU3 , FCM_UPPER4 , FCM_RITSU4 , FCM_UPPER5 , FCM_RITSU5 , FCM_UPPER6 , FCM_RITSU6 , FCM_UPPER7 , FCM_RITSU7 , FCM_KUBUN , FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU1 , FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU1 , FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU2 , FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU2 , FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU3 , FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU3 , FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU4 , FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU4 , FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU5 , FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU5 , FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU6 , FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU6 , FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU7 , FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU7 , FCM_H_SETTING_SEICHOU FROM FUND_COMMISSION_MST WHERE FCM_TYPE in ('1', '2') AND FCM_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd} AND FCM_DEALER_NUMBER = '01'
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-#Sql012 */ FUND_CODE , RESERVE_UNIT FROM HP_FUND_RESERVE_UNIT WHERE FUND_CODE = #{req.kyoukaiCd}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0401-#Sql013 */ RT_TAX / 100 + 1 as todayTax FROM RFUND_TAX_MASTER WHERE RT_DATE_FROM <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND RT_DATE_TO > IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
